expectations.text: Names SRP and frames it as 'one actor' (not 'one reason to change')
expectations.evidence: "By Martin's sharper SRP wording — 'responsible to one, and only one, actor'"

expectations.text: Identifies the distinct actors (5 stakeholder groups)
expectations.evidence: Table: Finance / Marketing / Operations / DBA / Finance-presentation

expectations.text: Proposes concrete split into OrderTotalCalculator / InventoryUpdater / ConfirmationNotifier / OrderRepository / InvoicePresenter
expectations.evidence: Exact match for all five classes
"accidental duplication" and "merge hotspot" both named, with concrete example of shared lineItems helper

expectations.text: Mentions Facade as optional preservation of a single entry point
expectations.evidence: "wrap them in an OrderFacade that delegates. Facade is a convenience, not a return to the god class."
